Skip to contents
readecb 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

ECB policy interest rates

Source: R/ecb_policy_rates.R
ecb_policy_rates.Rd

Returns the three main ECB policy rates: the main refinancing operations rate, the deposit facility rate, and the marginal lending facility rate.

Usage

ecb_policy_rates(from = NULL, to = NULL, cache = TRUE)

Arguments

from

Optional start date (e.g. "2020" or "2020-01").

to

Optional end date.

cache

Logical. Use cached data if available (default TRUE).

Value

A data frame with columns:

date

Date.

rate

Character. One of "Main refinancing rate", "Deposit facility rate", or "Marginal lending rate".

value

Numeric. Rate in percent per annum.

Examples

# \donttest{
ecb_policy_rates(from = "2022-01")
#> ℹ Fetching ECB policy rates
#> ✔ Fetching ECB policy rates [348ms]
#> 
#>            date                  rate value
#> 1    2022-01-01 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 2    2022-01-01 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 3    2022-01-01 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 4    2022-01-02 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 5    2022-01-02 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 6    2022-01-02 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 7    2022-01-03 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 8    2022-01-03 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 9    2022-01-03 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 10   2022-01-04 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 11   2022-01-04 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 12   2022-01-04 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 13   2022-01-05 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 14   2022-01-05 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 15   2022-01-05 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 16   2022-01-06 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 17   2022-01-06 Main refinancing rate  0.00
#> 18   2022-01-06 Marginal lending rate  0.25
#> 19   2022-01-07 Deposit facility rate -0.50
#> 20   2022-01-07 Main refinancing rate  0.00
